# Proverbs 8

## Verses (36)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Is not wisdom crying out, and the voice of knowledge sounding? | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | At the top of the highways, at the meeting of the roads, she takes her place; | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Where the roads go into the town her cry goes out, at the doorways her voice is loud: | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | I am crying out to you, O men; my voice comes to the sons of men. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Become expert in reason, O you simple ones; you foolish ones, take training to heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Give ear, for my words are true, and my lips are open to give out what is upright. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | For good faith goes out of my mouth, and false lips are disgusting to me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | All the words of my mouth are righteousness; there is nothing false or twisted in them. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | They are all true to him whose mind is awake, and straightforward to those who get knowledge. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Take my teaching, and not silver; get knowledge in place of the best gold. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | For wisdom is better than jewels, and all things which may be desired are nothing in comparison with her. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | I, wisdom, have made wise behaviour my near relation; I am seen to be the special friend of wise purposes. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | The fear of the Lord is seen in hating evil: pride, a high opinion of oneself, the evil way, and the false tongue, are unpleasing to me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | Wise design and good sense are mine; reason and strength are mine. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Through me kings have their power, and rulers give right decisions. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | Through me chiefs have authority, and the noble ones are judging in righteousness. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | Those who have given me their love are loved by me, and those who make search for me with care will get me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | Wealth and honour are in my hands, even wealth without equal and righteousness. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | My fruit is better than gold, even than the best gold; and my increase is more to be desired than silver. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | I go in the road of righteousness, in the way of right judging: | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | So that I may give my lovers wealth for their heritage, making their store-houses full. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | The Lord made me as the start of his way, the first of his works in the past. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | From eternal days I was given my place, from the birth of time, before the earth was. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | When there was no deep I was given birth, when there were no fountains flowing with water. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | Before the mountains were put in their places, before the hills was my birth: | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | When he had not made the earth or the fields or the dust of the world. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | When he made ready the heavens I was there: when he put an arch over the face of the deep: | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | When he made strong the skies overhead: when the fountains of the deep were fixed: | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | When he put a limit to the sea, so that the waters might not go against his word: when he put in position the bases of the earth: | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | Then I was by his side, as a master workman: and I was his delight from day to day, playing before him at all times; | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | Playing in his earth; and my delight was with the sons of men. | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
| [32](BBE.md#v32) | Give ear to me then, my sons: for happy are those who keep my ways. | [WEB](WEB.md#v32) · [KJV](KJV.md#v32) · [ASV](ASV.md#v32) |
| [33](BBE.md#v33) | Take my teaching and be wise; do not let it go. | [WEB](WEB.md#v33) · [KJV](KJV.md#v33) · [ASV](ASV.md#v33) |
| [34](BBE.md#v34) | Happy is the man who gives ear to me, watching at my doors day by day, keeping his place by the pillars of my house. | [WEB](WEB.md#v34) · [KJV](KJV.md#v34) · [ASV](ASV.md#v34) |
| [35](BBE.md#v35) | For whoever gets me gets life, and grace from the Lord will come to him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v35) · [KJV](KJV.md#v35) · [ASV](ASV.md#v35) |
| [36](BBE.md#v36) | But he who does evil to me, does wrong to his soul: all my haters are in love with death. | [WEB](WEB.md#v36) · [KJV](KJV.md#v36) · [ASV](ASV.md#v36) |
